title: Get help with an issue - Matthew Pennycook
meta_description: I can help constituents with a wide range of issues but, in many cases, others are best placed to assist. Read 'How I can help' to ensure I am the right person to contact. MPs only deal with enquiries and cases on behalf of their own constituents. Make sure I am your MP before sending… Continue reading Get help with an issue
text_excerpt: Get help with an issue - Matthew Pennycook Skip to content Matthew Pennycook Labour MP for Greenwich and Woolwich Menu Close About me Help for constituents General enquiries Contact me Get help with an issue I can help constituents with a wide range of issues but, in many cases, others are best placed to assist. Read ‘ How I can help ‘ to ensure I am the right person to contact. MPs only deal with enquiries and cases on behalf of their own constituents. Make sure I am your MP before sending your enquiry . Please choose the issue you need help with: Select an issue Immigration (status, applications, ability to enter the UK) Passports (delays) Housing (eviction, quality, suitability, access to) Health (including mental health) Welfare (changes in benefits payments and entitlements, disability allowances) Employment (issues with employer, dismissal) Community issues (crime and anti-social behaviour, safety, neighbours, noise) Our streets (dirt, noise, traffic, planning) Schools (access to, issues with) Transport (quality of public, congestion, policy) Public services (initiative under threat) Bills (unfair utility bills, council tax) Request an appointment with Matthew Something else (my issue doesn’t fit into one of these categories) Immigration E.g. immigration status, applications, ability to enter the UK Passport applications E.g. a delay Housing E.g. eviction, quality, suitability or access to housing Health (including mental health Welfare E.g. changes in benefit payments and entitlements or disability allowances Employment E.g. issues with an employer, such as discrimination or dismissal Community issues E.g. crime and anti-social behaviour, safety, neighbours or noise Our streets E.g. dirt, noise, traffic, planning Schools and education E.g. access to or issues with a school Transport E.g. quality of public transport, traffic and congestion, transport policy Public services E.g. a local service or initiative is under threat Bills E.g. unfair utility or council tax bills Something else --> If you are a constituent and you feel your issue would be better handled in person, get in touch to request an appointment . © Matthew Pennycook, 2025. | Office Standards Policy | Privacy policy | X | BlueSky | Facebook | YouTube Proudly powered by WordPress .
